data.cta_english: Is Mbappe the best player in the world? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: One young forward scored twenty two FIFA World Cup goals, but his ambition demanded more.
segments.image_query: dramatic football stadium lights night action
segments.subtitle_english: One young forward scored twenty two FIFA World Cup goals, but his ambition demanded more.
segments.voice_hindi: एक युवा फॉरवर्ड ने फीफा विश्व कप में बाईस गोल दागे, लेकिन उसकी महत्वाकांक्षा और अधिक की मांग कर रही थी।

segments.voice_english: Because he chased that ambition, Kylian Mbappe scored two hundred fifty six goals for Paris Saint-Germain.
segments.subtitle_english: Because he chased that ambition, Kylian Mbappe scored 256 goals for Paris Saint-Germain.
segments.voice_hindi: क्योंकि उन्होंने उस महत्वाकांक्षा का पीछा किया, किलियन म्बाप्पे ने पेरिस सेंट-जर्मेन के लिए दो सौ छप्पन गोल किए।

segments.voice_english: After conquering his club, he became France captain and scored sixty six national goals.
segments.image_query: Kylian Mbappe France national football team
segments.subtitle_english: After conquering his club, he became France captain and scored 66 national goals.
segments.voice_hindi: अपने क्लब पर विजय प्राप्त करने के बाद, वह फ्रांस के कप्तान बने और 66 राष्ट्रीय गोल किये।

segments.voice_english: That national success pushed his senior career over four hundred total goals before joining Real Madrid.
segments.subtitle_english: That national success pushed his senior career over 400 total goals before joining Real Madrid.
segments.voice_hindi: उस राष्ट्रीय सफलता ने रियल मैड्रिड में शामिल होने से पहले उनके वरिष्ठ करियर को चार सौ से अधिक लक्ष्यों तक पहुँचाया।

segments.voice_english: Which is why those twenty two World Cup goals show that his story continues today.
segments.subtitle_english: Which is why those 22 World Cup goals show that his story continues today.
segments.voice_hindi: यही कारण है कि विश्व कप के बाईस गोल बताते हैं कि उनकी कहानी आज भी जारी है।

data.youtube_title: Mbappe ne 256 Goals se Football History Badli! 🤯
title_options: Mbappe ne 256 Goals se Football History Badli! 🤯
Mbappe ke 22 World Cup Goals ka Record Unbroken! ⚽🔥
Mbappe ke 256 PSG Goals ka Secret Revealed! 😱
data.description: 22 World Cup goals se lekar 256 PSG goals tak, Kylian Mbappe ki journey sach me insane hai! 🤯 France ke liye 66 goals mark karke ab ye superstar Real Madrid me raj kar raha hai. Kya Mbappe Real Madrid me Ballon d'Or jeet payega? Comment me batao! 👇
